description: BP Batam: Total permohonan izin masuk per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_MASUK
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PB')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Izin terbit per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS IZIN_TERBIT
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit'
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Total backlog (belum terbit) per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_BACKLOG
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS NOT IN ('Terbit')
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS NOT LIKE '%Ditolak%'
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS NOT LIKE '%Batal%'
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Permohonan izin yang masih dalam proses per hari (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD') AS TANGGAL,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH_PERMOHONAN
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DALAM PROSES%'
  AND TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR IS NOT NULL
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD') ASC

description: BP Batam: Sebaran permohonan berdasarkan jenis izin dan kelompok status (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CASE PERIZINAN
        WHEN 'PBUMKU' THEN 'PBUMKU'
        WHEN 'PB' THEN 'PB'
        WHEN 'PL' THEN 'PL'
        WHEN 'PKKPRL' THEN 'PKKPRL'
        WHEN 'PPKH' THEN 'PPKH'
        ELSE PERIZINAN
    END AS JENIS_IZIN,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Tolak'
        ELSE 'Proses'
    END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
  AND {kategori_status}
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
GROUP BY
    PERIZINAN,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Tolak'
        ELSE 'Proses'
    END
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC

description: BP Batam: Komposisi keseluruhan status perizinan per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Ditolak'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {kategori_status}
GROUP BY
    TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW'),
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Ditolak'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC, JUMLAH DESC
examples: Rekap status izin terbit ditolak proses

description: DMT1: Total seluruh permohonan izin (chart Ringkasan)
DMT1: Total izin terbit (chart Ringkasan)
DMT1: Total izin ditolak (chart Ringkasan)
DMT1: Total izin dalam proses pelaku usaha (chart Ringkasan)
examples: Jumlah izin yang masih draft atau menunggu pemohon

description: DMT1: Total izin dalam proses internal (chart Ringkasan)
sql_template:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DALAM_PROSES
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS != 'Terbit'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%TOLAK%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%DITOLAK%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%REJECTED%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%DRAFT%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%PELAKU USAHA%'
  AND UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT LIKE '%WAITING FOR USER%'
  AND {tahun}
  AND {bulan}
  AND {perizinan}

description: DMT1: Sebaran izin per jenis dan kelompok status (chart Komposisi Izin)
sql_template:
SELECT
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM (
    SELECT
        PERIZINAN AS JENIS_IZIN,
        CASE
            WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DITOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%REJECTED%' THEN 'Tolak'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DRAFT%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%PELAKU USAHA%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%WAITING FOR USER%' THEN 'Proses Pelaku Usaha'
            ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
        END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS
    FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
      AND {tahun}
      AND {bulan}
      AND {perizinan}
      AND {kategori_status}
) sub
GROUP BY
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC
examples: Sebaran izin per jenis dan status

description: DMT1: Komposisi keseluruhan izin per jenis dan kelompok status (chart Komposisi Keseluruhan)
sql_template:
SELECT
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM (
    SELECT
        PERIZINAN AS JENIS_IZIN,
        CASE
            WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DITOLAK%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%REJECTED%' THEN 'Tolak'
            WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DRAFT%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%PELAKU USAHA%' OR UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%WAITING FOR USER%' THEN 'Proses Pelaku Usaha'
            ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
        END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS
    FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
    WHERE 1 = 1
      AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
      AND {tahun}
      AND {bulan}
      AND {perizinan}
      AND {kategori_status}
) sub
GROUP BY
    JENIS_IZIN,
    KELOMPOK_STATUS
ORDER BY JENIS_IZIN, JUMLAH DESC

description: BP Batam: Total beban level staf (verifikator) berdasarkan jumlah dokumen
sql_template:
SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_BEBAN
FROM US_DWH.BI_H_MON
WHERE VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL
  AND REGEXP_LIKE(VERIFIKATOR, '^[A-Z][A-Z_]{1,19}$')
  AND {tgl_status}
  AND {staff}
examples: Total beban level staf BP Batam

description: BP Batam: Aktivitas verifikator dalam jam kerja (08:00-17:00, Senin-Jumat)
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(ACTION_TIME, 'DD') AS TANGGAL,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_H_OSS
WHERE USER_PROCESS IS NOT NULL
  AND REGEXP_LIKE(USER_PROCESS, '^[A-Z][A-Z_]{1,19}$')
  AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'HH24')) >= 8
  AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'HH24')) < 17
  AND TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN')
  AND {action_time}
GROUP BY TRUNC(ACTION_TIME, 'DD')
ORDER BY TANGGAL ASC
examples: Aktivitas dalam jam kerja BP Batam

description: BP Batam: Aktivitas verifikator di luar jam kerja
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(ACTION_TIME, 'DD') AS TANGGAL,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_H_OSS
WHERE USER_PROCESS IS NOT NULL
  AND REGEXP_LIKE(USER_PROCESS, '^[A-Z][A-Z_]{1,19}$')
  AND NOT (
        TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'HH24')) >= 8
    AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'HH24')) < 17
    AND TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN')
  )
  AND {action_time}
GROUP BY TRUNC(ACTION_TIME, 'DD')
ORDER BY TANGGAL ASC
examples: Aktivitas luar jam kerja BP Batam
Dokumen diproses di luar jam kerja

description: BP Batam: Beban dokumen per staf verifikator
sql_template:
SELECT
    VERIFIKATOR AS NAMA_STAF,
    COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN,
    SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('SELESAI','TERBIT','APPROVED','IZIN TERBIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SELESAI,
    SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('DITOLAK','REJECTED','PENOLAKAN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DITOLAK,
    COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('SELESAI','TERBIT','APPROVED','IZIN TERBIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('DITOLAK','REJECTED','PENOLAKAN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DALAM_PROSES
FROM US_DWH.BI_H_MON
WHERE VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL
  AND REGEXP_LIKE(VERIFIKATOR, '^[A-Z][A-Z_]{1,19}$')
  AND {tgl_status}
GROUP BY VERIFIKATOR
ORDER BY TOTAL_DOKUMEN DESC
examples: Beban dokumen per staf BP Batam

description: BP Batam: Komposisi waktu kerja staf (dalam vs luar jam kerja)
sql_template:
SELECT
    KATEGORI_WAKTU,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'HH24')) >= 8
             AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'HH24')) < 17
             AND TO_CHAR(ACTION_TIME, 'DY') NOT IN ('SAT','SUN')
            THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja'
            ELSE 'Luar Jam Kerja'
        END AS KATEGORI_WAKTU
    FROM US_DWH.BI_H_OSS
    WHERE USER_PROCESS IS NOT NULL
      AND REGEXP_LIKE(USER_PROCESS, '^[A-Z][A-Z_]{1,19}$')
      AND {action_time}
)
GROUP BY KATEGORI_WAKTU
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC
examples: Komposisi waktu kerja staf BP Batam
Perbandingan dalam dan luar jam kerja

description: BP Batam: Rapor evaluasi khusus level staf (verifikator)
sql_template:
SELECT
    ROWNUM AS NO,
    NAMA_STAF,
    TOTAL_DOKUMEN,
    SELESAI,
    DITOLAK,
    PERSEN_SELESAI,
    ANALISIS_BEBAN
FROM (
    SELECT
        VERIFIKATOR AS NAMA_STAF,
        COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN,
        SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('SELESAI','TERBIT','APPROVED','IZIN TERBIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SELESAI,
        SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('DITOLAK','REJECTED','PENOLAKAN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DITOLAK,
        ROUND(
            SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('SELESAI','TERBIT','APPROVED','IZIN TERBIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN), 0) * 100
        , 1) AS PERSEN_SELESAI,
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN) > 500 THEN 'Beban Ekstrem (Overload)'
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN) > 200 THEN 'Beban Tinggi'
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT NO_PERMOHONAN) > 100 THEN 'Beban Normal'
            ELSE 'Beban Rendah'
        END AS ANALISIS_BEBAN
    FROM US_DWH.BI_H_MON
    WHERE VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL
      AND REGEXP_LIKE(VERIFIKATOR, '^[A-Z][A-Z_]{1,19}$')
      AND {tgl_status}
      AND {staff}
    GROUP BY VERIFIKATOR
    ORDER BY TOTAL_DOKUMEN DESC
)

description: BP Batam: Total masuk permohonan reklame per bulan
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(TGL_DAFTAR, 'MM') AS BULAN,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_BSW
WHERE TGL_DAFTAR IS NOT NULL
  AND {tgl_daftar}
  AND {jenis_reklame}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_DAFTAR, 'MM')
ORDER BY BULAN ASC

description: BP Batam: Reklame kadaluarsa per bulan
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(TGL_JATUH_TEMPO, 'MM') AS BULAN,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_BSW
WHERE STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '3 - KEDALUWARSA'
  AND TGL_JATUH_TEMPO IS NOT NULL
  AND {tgl_jatuh_tempo}
  AND {jenis_reklame}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_JATUH_TEMPO, 'MM')
ORDER BY BULAN ASC

params.tgl_jatuh_tempo: Filter tanggal jatuh tempo (contoh: TGL_JATUH_TEMPO >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

description: BP Batam: Reklame dengan tanggal kosong per bulan
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(TGL_DAFTAR, 'MM') AS BULAN,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_BSW
WHERE STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '4 - TANGGAL KOSONG'
  AND TGL_DAFTAR IS NOT NULL
  AND {tgl_daftar}
  AND {jenis_reklame}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_DAFTAR, 'MM')
ORDER BY BULAN ASC

description: BP Batam: Rasio masa berlaku reklame
sql_template:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '2 - SEGERA HABIS (<= 30 HARI)' THEN 'Segera Habis'
        WHEN STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '3 - KEDALUWARSA' THEN 'Kedaluwarsa'
        WHEN STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '4 - TANGGAL KOSONG' THEN 'Tanggal Kosong'
        ELSE STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU
    END AS KATEGORI,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_BSW
WHERE {tgl_daftar}
  AND {jenis_reklame}
GROUP BY STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC
examples: Rasio masa berlaku reklame BP Batam

description: BP Batam: Daftar tagihan perpanjangan reklame prioritas
sql_template:
SELECT
    NAMA_PERUSAHAAN,
    NO_PERMOHONAN AS NOMOR_SK_REKLAME,
    TGL_JATUH_TEMPO AS TANGGAL_BERAKHIR,
    CASE
        WHEN STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '2 - SEGERA HABIS (<= 30 HARI)' THEN 'Segera Habis'
        WHEN STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU = '3 - KEDALUWARSA' THEN 'Kedaluwarsa'
        ELSE STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU
    END AS STATUS,
    SISA_HARI_BERLAKU,
    'Sisa ' || SISA_HARI_BERLAKU || ' Hari' AS STATUS_SISA_WAKTU
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_BSW
WHERE STATUS_MASA_BERLAKU IN ('2 - SEGERA HABIS (<= 30 HARI)', '3 - KEDALUWARSA')
  AND TGL_JATUH_TEMPO IS NOT NULL
  AND {tgl_jatuh_tempo}
  AND {jenis_reklame}
ORDER BY TGL_JATUH_TEMPO ASC

params.tgl_jatuh_tempo: Filter tanggal jatuh tempo (contoh: TGL_JATUH_TEMPO >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))
